get.description:
Establishes a WebSocket connection to the global lobby.
Requires a valid session cookie. Once connected, sends a chat message "{User} has connected".

post.description: Authenticates user, creates a session, and sets an HttpOnly cookie

get.description: Returns paginated list of packs created by the user

post.description: Creates a game pack for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a list of pack previews based on search query
Generates a URL and form data for file upload
Retrieves a specific pack by its unique identifier

post.description: Creates a new account, automatically logs in, and sets an HttpOnly cookie

400.description: User already exists or validation failed

get.description:
Establishes a WebSocket connection to the playing room.
Requires a valid session cookie. Once connected, sends a chat message "{User} has connected".
Returns a list of all available game rooms

post.description: Creates a game room for the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a specific room's state (projection) by ID. Used for initial load.

200.description: Can be RoomLobby, HostRoom, or RoomPlayer

patch.description: Adds the authenticated user to a room

403.description: Forbidden: Room full or invalid password

patch.description: Removes the authenticated user from a room

get.description: Retrieves the profile of the currently authenticated user based on session

post.description: Creates a new user account with provided data

get.description: Retrieves a user profile by their unique identifier

put.description: Updates an existing user's information by ID

delete.description: Permanently removes a user account by ID
